commit.message:
Add MACHTwoChannel: two-channel modulation + writing architecture

Channel 1 (modulation): learned activation primitives with continuous scalar
weights for natural interpolation. Channel 2 (writing): existing basis vector
patch system with higher metabolic cost penalty. Both driven by shared
task_state from DemoProjection. ~654K params.

Exclude future pager-only shifts from monthly point totals (#36)

Calendar sync creates placeholder shifts for future dates with no
time entries. These were counting pager pay in the monthly total
before the shifts were actually worked. Now skips any shift where
date > today and no real time entries exist. Affects:
- getMonthlyTotals() (used by pipeline, trends, comp charts)
- updateHeaderPoints() (header monthly total)
- renderMonthlyPace() (pace chart current month points)

commit.message:
feat: consolidation orphan warning + auto-detect embedding provider

Phase 2 UX improvements:

1. Consolidation post-run hints:
   - Shows orphan count + prune suggestion when orphan rate > 20%
   - Shows consolidation hint when no memories reached SEMANTIC stage
   - Non-blocking: errors in hint generation don't fail consolidation

2. Embedding provider auto-detection (provider = "auto"):
   - Detection order: Ollama → sentence-transformers → Gemini → OpenAI
   - Ollama: checks localhost:11434, prefers bge-m3/nomic-embed-text
   - sentence-transformers: uses multilingual MiniLM (50+ languages)
   - Falls back to graph-only recall if nothing available
   - Lowers barrier for cross-language recall setup

Updated: config.py, unified_config.py, semantic_discovery.py,
tools.py, embedding-setup.md, README.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add GCloud deployment, cross-org IPC, and headless MCP client

Deploy HelloWorld MCP server to Cloud Run (helloworld-lang project)
with SQLite message bus replicated to GCS via Litestream. Three agents
now communicate across org boundaries: claude@purdy.im,
claude@cancelself.gmail.com, and claude-code@cancelself.gmail.com.

- Add Makefile with build/push/deploy/infra targets (linux/amd64)
- Add SQLiteTransport for durable message storage alongside FileTransport
- Add Litestream config and entrypoint for SQLite->GCS replication
- Add #address (receiver@domain) and #context symbols to HelloWorld/Agent
- Add #address-aware routing: qualified names route to distinct inboxes
- Add vocabulary_save update=True flag for amending symbol descriptions
- Add update_hw_symbol to hw_reader for in-place description replacement
- Add headless MCP client with OAuth 2.1 PKCE, token caching, SSE parsing
- Add --receive and --send CLI commands for shared bus access
- Add logging to MCP server for message tracing
- Mount MCP endpoint at / for Claude.ai compatibility

commit.message:
fix(hdmi): display_type monitor misclassified as TV + boot-to-video always 0ms

Display type: PC monitors with CEA EDID extension (HDMI audio/YCbCr) were
falsely classified as "tv". Added manufacturer-based filtering — known
PC-only manufacturers (LEN, DEL, ACI, HWP, BNQ, ACR, EIZ, NEC, AOC)
are always "monitor" in both getDisplayInfo() and _inferDisplayCategory().
Incident: NLF Handball Lenovo L27i-30 showed "Type: TV" in dashboard.

Boot-to-video: hdmiConnected defaults to true, so wasDisconnected was
always false at boot → hdmiDetectedAt never set → metric always 0ms.
Fixed by capturing timestamp on first HDMI status while connected.

Regression protection:
- 8 new unit tests for manufacturer-based classification
- 3 new smoke tests (CEA filter, 4th param, wasDisconnected guard)
- 2 new CLAUDE.md "NE JAMAIS FAIRE" rules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix conversation message delivery and add DM sounds

Root cause: conversation_messages.user_id and conversation_members.user_id
FKs referenced auth.users(id) instead of public.profiles(id). PostgREST
resolves join syntax profiles(*) only via FK relationships — without a
direct FK to public.profiles, the join returns null, so the realtime
message fetch returns no profile data and the message is dropped.

- migration_v9.sql: changes both FKs to reference public.profiles(id)
- ConversationRoom: add playMessageSound() for incoming DM/group messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(backfill): use yt-dlp for video download + CAST() for asyncpg compat

Backfill script was using requests.get() on TikTok page URLs, getting
HTML instead of video data. Now uses VideoDownloader (yt-dlp/Playwright)
same as the VDG pipeline. Also fixed asyncpg :: cast syntax conflict
by using CAST() and increased rate limit to 8s (TwelveLabs: 8req/min).

add IP rate limiting to /api/chat (20 req/min per IP)

Uses @upstash/ratelimit with sliding window to prevent API abuse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: proxy protocol handling — root cause of client's 100% connection failures

Root cause: client's ___config.json had "socks5:p.webshare.io:80:user:pass"
(rotating HTTP proxy endpoint mislabeled as SOCKS5). Three bugs amplified this:

1. Auto-correct socks5→http on port 80 (controllers.py:300-305)
   Changed protocol silently. Telethon can't use HTTP forward proxies for
   MTProto. Now: log warning only, keep original protocol.

2. Import sharing: all accounts got same rotating proxy (controllers.py:261-266)
   When config proxy was already assigned, code shared it to all accounts.
   12 dedicated SOCKS5 proxies sat unused. Now: try free dedicated proxy
   first before sharing.

3. Preflight didn't check proxy protocol compatibility (app.py:1696-1727)
   HTTP proxies passed preflight for Migrate mode. Now: blocks batch with
   clear Russian message "Telethon не поддерживает HTTP прокси".

4. Quick auto-assign only checked proxy_id=None (app.py:1762)
   Accounts with HTTP proxy weren't reassigned. Now: for Migrate mode,
   also reassigns accounts with HTTP proxies to free SOCKS5.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

Fix launcher icon: remove adaptive icon XML overriding PNG

The adaptive icon XML was using the foreground PNG (which already has
its own background) on a solid saffron background, causing a cropped
and distorted icon on Android 8+. Removing the XML lets Android use
the designed PNG icons directly.

commit.message:
位置合わせ再描画バグ修正・縮尺計算修正・A4デフォルト化

- updateImage が MapLibre 5.x で GPU 再描画を起こさない問題を修正:
  ソース削除→再追加（_replaceImageSource）に切り替えてリアルタイム更新を保証
  ドラッグ・回転・縮尺変更・微調整4隅すべてに適用
- 縮尺バーの計算バグ修正: SCREEN_DPI を devicePixelRatio×96 から 96 固定に変更
  MapLibre getZoom() は CSS pixel 基準のため高DPI環境で2倍ずれていた
- 用紙サイズ自動検出を削除、A4縦をデフォルトに固定（変更可）
- 画像モード初回表示時に fitBounds で画像全体が見えるよう自動調整

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: mobile tap / scroll (#19)

* feat(web): add mobile swipe navigation

Implement touch-based navigation for mobile browsers:
- Left/right swipe for page navigation
- Up/down swipe for content scrolling with axis locking
- Swipe detection logic lives in JS (web-only concern)
- Expose next_page/prev_page/scroll_down/scroll_up/cell_height via wasm_bindgen

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XFDL6b9VMYq8G1RtCNB5Eu

* feat(web): use tap zones instead of swipe for page navigation

Replace horizontal swipe with left/right 40% tap zones for page
transitions. Vertical scroll via touch move is preserved.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XFDL6b9VMYq8G1RtCNB5Eu

* feat(web): ignore long-press as tap (200ms threshold)

Taps longer than 200ms are not treated as page navigation,
preventing accidental page changes when holding the screen.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XFDL6b9VMYq8G1RtCNB5Eu

* fix(web): account for line wrapping in overlay link positions and scrollbar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use NBSP in code blocks to prevent word-wrap mismatch

ratatui word-wraps at space boundaries, but wrapped_line_height uses
character-based wrapping. This mismatch caused fill_line_backgrounds
to paint code block bg at wrong rows, losing the bottom padding line.

NBSP is explicitly excluded from word boundaries by ratatui, so the
word wrapper falls back to character-based wrapping, matching our
height calculation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
